channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside alleyway/1 Powerscroft road, 4th April
item.description:
Another day, another set of rubbish outside. This needs an actual permanent solution

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bird Nesting/Bird Fouling - Pest Control Needed, 4th April
item.description:
There are pigeons nesting behind the sign of the mobile phone shop at 368 Norwood Road, causing extensive bird fouling to the pavement beneath. Pest control intervention is required.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 368, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th April
item.description:
Flytip furniture and rubbish left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leycroft Gardens, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping 5-10 items, 4th April
item.description:
Here for a few days, has also been rifled through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 256, Croxted Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders continuously burning commercial waste, 4th April
item.description:
Builders have been at 30 Ingleby Way for the last 5 months. They continuously burn their waste in the garden. The smells and flyash coming from the fires is appalling - I have no idea what the smell is but I am concerned it could be a health hazard. It certainly isn't garden waste. Fires happen at least once a week, and have lately becoming much more frequent. Shoudln't their commercial waste be disposed of properly?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cow Path, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cover blown down the pavement blocking people walking going in to the road to pass it, 4th April
item.description:
Tree cover blocking pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter, 4th April
item.description:
The litter is along the verge and hedgerow. I have reported it many times to the council, but months later its still not done and much worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Pondfield Lane, Herongate and Ingrave, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet
